LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN D. YOHANAN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE HER LIST OF APPRAISERS WITHIN 14 DAYS. IF THE PARTIES DO NOT AGREE ON AN APPRAISER WITHIN 14 DAYS, THEREAFTER, JUDGE HODGE SHALL SELECT THE APPRAISER. IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PROVIDE HER LIST WITHIN 14 DAYS, DEFENDANT MAY UNILATERALLY SELECT THE APPRAISER. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS TO THE QUITCLAIM DEED. ALL OTHER RELIEF SOUGHT BY THE MOTION IS EITHER NOT APPROPRIATE AT THIS TIME AND/OR IS BEYOND THE SCOPE OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENTS. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,480 (15 HOURS AT $30 PER HOUR PLUS $40 IN COSTS). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant ; Declaration Of John D. Yohanan And Elizabeth T. Erhardt In Support
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICHARD K. CRITCHLOW OF THE CRITCHLOW DISKINI & PIRELLI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 925-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ELIZABETH T. ERHARDT OF THE RUTAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (650) 798-5671 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JOHN YOHANAN.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant JOHN D. YOHANAN'S Motion to Enforce Settlement is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to provide her list of appraisers within 14 days. If the parties do not agree on an appraiser within 14 days, thereafter, Judge Hodge shall select the appraiser. If plaintiff does not provide her list within 14 days, defendant may unilaterally select the appraiser. The motion is moot as to the quitclaim deed. All other relief sought by the motion is either not appropriate at this time and/or is beyond the scope of the parties' agreements. Defendant is awarded fees and costs in the amount of $4,480 (15 hours at $30 per hour plus $40 in costs). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
